---
title: "DataLoad"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
pacman::p_load(tidyverse, tidycensus, knitr, ggplot2,reshape2,dplyr)

census_api_key("97a9bbf0b9b38b5f7c1f2358bad0d8cc0804d089", install = TRUE, overwrite = TRUE)
readRenviron("~/.Renviron")
```

Loading all the chunks in this file will save the datasets used in our dashboard
to your local .RData file, making the process of data retrieval much faster and smoother

```{r Seb and Oscar Data}

#Seb data download
years <- c(2005:2019, 2021:2023)

all_renter_age_groups <- c(
  total = "B25007_012",
  '15.to.24.years' = "B25007_013",
  '25.to.34.years' = "B25007_014",
  '35.to.44.years' = "B25007_015",
  '45.to.54.years' = "B25007_016",
  '55.to.59.years' = "B25007_017",
  '60.to.64.years' = "B25007_018",
  '65.to.74.years' = "B25007_019",
  '75.to.84.years' = "B25007_020",
  '85.years.and.over' = "B25007_021"
)

#using this to test
get_stuff <- function(year) {
  age_ranges <- get_acs(
    geography = "state", 
    variable = all_renter_age_groups,
    year = year,
    survey = "acs1") %>%
    select(-one_of('GEOID','moe')) %>%
    mutate(year = year) %>%
    rename_at('estimate',~"Total") %>%
    rename_at('variable',~"Age_Range")
}

renter_occupied_new <- map_df(years, get_stuff)

all_owner_age_groups <- c(
  total = "B25007_002",
  '15.to.24.years' = "B25007_003",
  '25.to.34.years' = "B25007_004",
  '35.to.44.years' = "B25007_005",
  '45.to.54.years' = "B25007_006",
  '55.to.59.years' = "B25007_007",
  '60.to.64.years' = "B25007_008",
  '65.to.74.years' = "B25007_009",
  '75.to.84.years' = "B25007_010",
  '85.years.and.over' = "B25007_011"
)

#using this to test
get_stuff <- function(year) {
  age_ranges <- get_acs(
    geography = "state", 
    variable = all_owner_age_groups,
    year = year,
    survey = "acs1") %>%
    select(-one_of('GEOID','moe')) %>%
    mutate(year = year) %>%
    rename_at('estimate',~"Total") %>%
    rename_at('variable',~"Age_Range")
}

owner_occupied_new <- map_df(years, get_stuff)

#Oscar Data download

pop <- map_df(years, function(yr) {
  get_acs(
    geography = "place",
    table = "B01003",
    year = yr,
    survey = "acs1",
    cache_table = TRUE
  ) %>%
    rename(population = estimate) %>%
    mutate(year = yr)
})

rent <- map_df(years, function(yr) {
  get_acs(
    geography = "place",
    table = "B25070",
    year = yr,
    survey = "acs1",
    cache_table = TRUE
  ) %>%
    mutate(year = yr)
})

rent_clean <- rent %>%
  select(GEOID, NAME, variable, estimate, year) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = variable, values_from = estimate) %>%
  mutate(
    total = B25070_001,
    cost_burdened = B25070_007 + B25070_008 + B25070_009 + B25070_010,
    severely_burdened = B25070_010,
    pct_burdened = (cost_burdened / total) * 100,
    pct_severe = (severely_burdened / total) * 100
  )

rent_big_cities <- rent_clean %>%
  left_join(pop, by = c("GEOID", "NAME", "year")) %>%
  filter(population >= 500000)

```

```{r connor data}

loaded <- readRDS("data/Connor/final_data.rds")

```

```{r riku data}

housing_map_data <- read.csv("data/housing_data_2005_2023.csv")
housing_map_data$year <- as.numeric(housing_map_data$year)
state_edu_income_data <- read.csv("data/education_earnings_acs1.csv")
country_edu_income_data <- read.csv("data/us_edu_earnings.csv")

# Sys.setenv(GITHUB_PAT = "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")
# GIT_TOKEN <- Sys.getenv("GITHUB_PAT")
# housing_map_data_RAW_URL <- "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/UWB-Adv-Data-Vis-2025-Autumn/costlyliving-hoa/refs/heads/main/housing_data_2005_2023.csv?token=GHSAT0AAAAAADQNS2K4AYQ7QNPZXTZGACAK2JOIVYA"
# state_edu_income_data_RAW_URL <- "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/UWB-Adv-Data-Vis-2025-Autumn/costlyliving-hoa/refs/heads/main/education_earnings_acs1.csv?token=GHSAT0AAAAAADQK4VZOPB62VU53URUG4U5S2JM52WA"
# country_edu_income_data_RAW_URL <- "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/UWB-Adv-Data-Vis-2025-Autumn/costlyliving-hoa/refs/heads/main/us_edu_earnings.csv?token=GHSAT0AAAAAADQK4VZP3SWKOWGGAFG3B7XU2JM7VAA"
# GIT_TOKEN <- Sys.getenv("GITHUB_PAT")
# 
# # Check for token availability before attempting connection
# if (GIT_TOKEN == "") {
#   stop("FATAL: GITHUB_PAT environment variable not set. Cannot access private repo.")
# }
# # --- 2. HELPER FUNCTION TO FETCH AND READ ---
# #' Fetches a CSV file from a private GitHub repository using a PAT.
# #'
# #' @param url The raw URL of the CSV file.
# #' @param token The Personal Access Token for authentication.
# #' @return A data frame containing the CSV data.
# fetch_private_csv <- function(url, token) {
#   
#   # Use explicit namespaces to prevent 'function not found' errors
#   response <- httr::GET(
#     url,
#     # Authenticate using the PAT in the Authorization header
#     httr::add_headers(Authorization = paste("token", token))
#   )
#   
#   # Check for successful HTTP status (200)
#   if (httr::http_status(response)$category == "Success") {
#     # Read the content directly from the response object
#     data_content <- httr::content(response, "text", encoding = "UTF-8")
#     # Use readr::read_csv to parse the text content into a data frame
#     df <- readr::read_csv(data_content)
#     message(paste("Successfully loaded:", basename(url)))
#     return(df)
#   } else {
#     stop(paste("Failed to retrieve file:", basename(url),
#                "Status:", httr::status_code(response),
#                ". Check PAT and URL."))
#   }
# }
# # 1. Housing Data
# housing_map_data <- tryCatch({
#   fetch_private_csv(housing_map_data_RAW_URL, GIT_TOKEN)
# }, error = function(e) {
#   stop(paste("Error loading housing data:", e$message))
# })
# housing_map_data$year <- as.numeric(housing_map_data$year)
# # 2. State Education Data
# state_edu_income_data <- tryCatch({
#   fetch_private_csv(state_edu_income_data_RAW_URL, GIT_TOKEN)
# }, error = function(e) {
#   stop(paste("Error loading state education data:", e$message))
# })
# # 3. Country Education Data
# country_edu_income_data <- tryCatch({
#   fetch_private_csv(country_edu_income_data_RAW_URL, GIT_TOKEN)
# }, error = function(e) {
#   stop(paste("Error loading country education data:", e$message))
# })


```



```{r save to rdata}

# rm(pop,rent,rent_clean)
# rm(all_owner_age_groups,all_renter_age_groups,country_edu_income_data_RAW_URL,GIT_TOKEN,housing_map_data_RAW_URL,state_edu_income_data_RAW_URL,years)
# rm(fetch_private_csv,get_stuff)

save.image(file = ".RData")

```
